message: agent2 here: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' feature - adding sort_palette parameter to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method area) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will ping if I need to touch other files.

agent1: implementing 'max_colors' parameter for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Will touch Image.py's quantize method. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent1: heads up, I already modified quantize()'s signature in src/PIL/Image.py to add 'max_colors=None' as the last param, plus a validation block right after self.load() (max_colors is None -> defaults to colors; else validates 1-256 and caps colors = min(colors, max_colors)). Also added test_quantize_max_colors() in Tests/test_image_quantize.py right before test_transparent_colors_equal(). Please add your sort_palette param after mine in the signature (order matters less, just don't overwrite my max_colors logic), and add your test as a separate function so we don't get merge conflicts. My diff is isolated to those two spots - let me know if you want me to hold off on submitting so you can rebase, or if you're handling merge separately.

Thanks for the heads up. FYI in my sandbox copy of src/PIL/Image.py there's no max_colors code present - looks like we each have separate working copies, so no live conflict on my end. My sort_palette implementation is done: added quantize(..., sort_palette=None) accepting 'brightness'/'rgb', plus a private _sort_palette() helper that reorders the palette and remaps pixel indices via im.point(). Tests added: test_quantize_sort_palette, test_quantize_sort_palette_invalid. If these get merged into one file later, my changes touch the quantize() signature/docstring (added sort_palette as last param) and add the if sort_palette: block + _sort_palette method right after the existing im.palette assignment in quantize(). Should merge cleanly next to your max_colors validation block near the top of the method.
